analysis.reasoning: Core message: China fulfilled its 2020 UN assessed contributions and peacekeeping dues in full, asserting that timely full payment is an obligation for all member states, especially major powers. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no explicit or implicit attack on the West or US. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; it showcases China’s concrete support for the UN and multilateral obligations, portraying responsible, cooperative international behavior. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic focus): Not applicable; the tweet addresses international conduct, not domestic system/values. CH5 (CCP governance succeeds): Not directly; no claim about domestic development or governance performance. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
